notes: England are without Tino Livramento (calf, tournament-ruled out) and have a late doubt over Bukayo Saka's workload management, while Tuchel faces selection dilemmas at centre-back, left wing, and No.10; Croatia arrive with a fully fit squad — Luka Modrić (recovered from fractured cheekbone) and Joško Gvardiol (recovered from fractured shin) both confirmed starters, and neither side carries any suspensions.
home_scorers: Jude Bellingham (expected No.10 starter, goal threat from midfield)
Bukayo Saka (first-choice right winger, set-piece and dribble threat)
away_scorers: Ivan Perišić (left wing, 26 goal involvements last club season)
Luka Modrić (deep-lying playmaker, set-piece and long-range threat)
